description: A color photograph taken inside what appears to be a fast-food restaurant with a painted ocean mural on the wall behind. An adult man with short dark hair, sunglasses resting on his head and a short beard sits at a round table smiling toward the camera, wearing a purple t-shirt. Food wrappers and drinks are on the table. A small child stands in the foreground; the child's face is blurred. The image carries no overlaid text or seal.
